title: urochloa brizantha var. ciliata
intro: Urochloa brizantha var. ciliata, also known as 'Marandu grass', is a type of tropical grass native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Urochloa brizantha var. ciliata include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
